fetchMethod: Codex in-app browser, Google Maps place panel, Reviews tab, sorted by Newest, scrolled and parsed from DOM snapshots
coverage: Visible browser scrape sample only; capped at 30 newest-sorted Google review rows for audit use.

reviews.author: Trinity Powers
reviews.body: I came here for the first time today to kill some time before an appointment. The exterior is decorated beautifully with plants, as is the interior. Servers are very kind, attentive, and friendly. I was served by Blanca, a very kind young woman who made sure I was well taken care of. There was another girl with pink braces, I did not catch her name but she was very kind to me as well. I ordered the pork fried dumplings, firecracker roll, Mekong margarita, and crème brulee. Everything was presented beautifully and exceeded my expectations for the price. I am overall very pleased with the experience and plan to invite my boyfriend out to try it as well.

reviews.author: Joyce M
reviews.body: Food that I ordered wasn't that good. I probably won't go back. The dumplings that I ordered tasted like they came straight out of the freezer section at the supermarket.

reviews.author: Marcos Gonzalez
reviews.body: Waited 15 minutes before we left, no one greeted us at our table. A couple (white people) and they got immediately served

reviews.author: Jacob McClure
reviews.body: "The food here has for the most part been very good on the two visits I've made, but there are several detractors from both experiences. Actual rating: 3.5⭐ The bánh khọt is great. Super crispy and a generous amount of filling, but I do prefer nước chấm to have chilis in it. The bún gà nướng chả giò had excellent flavor and the chicken was seasoned and cooked perfectly, but the lack of lettuce and the chicken being served on skewers made it feel deconstructed and meant to be eaten individually rather than as a complete dish. While the flavor was great the presentation wasn't my favorite. Coconut matcha - no notes. Delicious. The taro milk tea is SWEET. I'm not exaggerating when I say it's 4-5x sweeter than I want it. I went back for a sip a few times throughout my second visit and for me it was just undrinkable; I would compare it to the milk in a bowl of fruity pebbles if you added even more sugar to it. V's iced coffee, again, SWEET. As someone who loves cà phê sữa đá and cà phê trứng I am no stranger to Vietnamese coffee being sweet but this was just too much. It's was much more palatable than the taro milk tea, for what it's worth. The pandan waffles were delicious, but not really as expected/described. The menu lists them as being filled with toasted coconut flakes, which technically is true but filled isn't the right word for it. The batter has coconut flakes in it, the waffles don't have a coconut filling. Pandan waffles always have coconut flavor added in the batter in one way or another so it's really just a normal pandan waffle. The service, overall good, but it's off-putting how much I've felt rushed to leave both times I've visited. The first time we had just ordered an after dinner drink and were then handed the check and told we could pick up the drinks at the takeout window; the restaurant was not busy, it was not peak meal hours, and there was almost 45 minutes until close. The first time I chalked it up to our waitress potentially being scheduled to leave early or something like that. On the second visit while there we were still eating dessert our waitress came by and asked if we wanted the check. This time we were there much earlier in the day but in the off hours between lunch and dinner. Overall, not a bad place. Good food, great design. I would go back if invited, but I probably wouldn't choose it myself for anything other than a takeout matcha."

reviews.author: Joel Reyes
reviews.body: Great atmosphere! The Food was excellent! The service was awesome! Great date night spot!

reviews.author: Jays On Cam
reviews.body: This is one of the most consistent places in DFW been going since 2022 so good go at least twice a year

reviews.author: C Castillo
reviews.body: Came in hungry and left full and happy. The Udon stir fried noodles are so dang good, I started planning when I was coming back to eat here again because of it. Service was crazy fast and very nice attentive staff. Will be bringing friends and family to try out!!

reviews.author: Phil Robison
reviews.body: Blown away by the quality of the service and food Definitely will be back Short rib and quail egg dish was simply amazing Generous portions

reviews.author: K Jo
reviews.body: Love v house ! Love the patio! Hate the new patio chair’s.

reviews.author: carlos Díaz
reviews.body: Great place to have a good time.

reviews.author: Biraaj Rout
reviews.body: Had a really nice time here—the vibe is relaxed and perfect for hanging out with friends, and the food definitely lives up to the hype. The garlic fish sauce wings, spring rolls, and stir-fried noodles were all standout dishes and you can tell why they’re so popular. Kathy was amazing too—super friendly and attentive, and she made us feel right at home without it feeling forced. Overall, great food, great atmosphere, and even better service… definitely coming back!

reviews.author: Tony Diaz
reviews.body: it's worth it to come and try what they have to offer. I had dumplings, expresso martini, sushi, some wine, the waffles and beignets with a lemondrop shot, shared amongst friends. it was chill.

reviews.author: Casey Mack
reviews.body: Food is so good. Took folks who never at pho before and they now love Vs house!

reviews.author: William H
reviews.body: Excellent flavor of Vietnamese cuisine. Extremely large portions of Pho, the small is shareable. We will definitely be back!

reviews.author: Ariel Ryen
reviews.body: Omg this place is so yummm

reviews.author: nicole simmons
reviews.body: Went for a bday dinner the pho beef broth was phenomenal 😋 one of the best flavor ...

reviews.author: Katherine Crownover
reviews.body: I always have a good time here! The food is delicious AND consistent, which is always a plus. I’m never wondering if it’s gonna taste the same as last time, it’s always good! I came in for lunch and Clarissa (I think that was her name) was so sweet! Will be back soon!

reviews.author: Evelyn Alarcon
reviews.body: So excited to have an authentic and delicious Vietnamese restaurant in town!

sourceNotes: The in-app browser reached the live Google Maps Reviews tab without CAPTCHA.
The page was sorted by Newest before collection.
Final artifact intentionally caps reviews at 30 max for audit/usefulness.
Rows are parsed from accessibility DOM snapshots, so text marked bodyTruncated may still need manual expansion if exact full text is required.
Google relative dates are preserved as shown on 2026-04-30.
